_comment: exp_019 — GRPO pass 3. RESTARTED 2026-05-19 with Path B recipe after observing variance collapse in first 6 steps of the loose-curriculum run (3 of 6 steps had reward_std<0.02 — all-correct or all-clipped). Two changes from exp_015 pass 2: (1) start from merged pass-2 model TrevorDuong/qwen3-4b-thinking-grpo-pass2, (2) STRICT curriculum_pass3.json (num_correct 1-3, no_clip, FF:MCQ>=2 → 88 prompts) replaces the original loose filter. Bonus knob change for safety margin against the clip-disaster failure mode: max_completion_length 4096 → 5120 (exp_010 OOMed at 6144; 5120 has ~17% memory margin).
_curriculum_note: Built from data/difficulty_samples_pass2.jsonl (DSMLP resample of the merged pass-2 model on full public.jsonl). Path B switched from loose to STRICT filter on 2026-05-19: --min-correct 1 --max-correct 3 (no --allow-clipped) → 92 prompts → 88 after FF:MCQ>=2 cap (29 MCQ / 59 FF). Strict filter eliminates the all-clipped disaster mode observed in the loose-curriculum's step 4 (clipped_ratio=1.0, reward_std=0.0002).

length_bonus.note: Same as exp_015. Continuous descent from 0.05 at len=0 to 0.0 at cap; guarantees nonzero reward_std even when discrete reward terms collapse across the 4 generations in a group.

_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=pass-2 GRPO. Do NOT override to strict70 or base Thinking-2507 (would pull policy backward).

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id=output_repo (after running merge_and_push.ipynb to merge the adapter).
